checks.title: tsc --noEmit 0 errors (grid-export + tw-framework-front)
checks.evidence: Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` at `D:/project/topvel_project/topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/grid-export` -> exit 0, no output (0 errors). Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` at `D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/tw-framework-front` -> exit 0, no output. Both pass. (AC-007, C-12)

checks.title: tsup build 통과 (CJS + ESM dual)
checks.evidence: `npx tsup` exit 0 at packages/grid-export. Output: dist/index.mjs 2.84 KB + dist/index.cjs 3.40 KB + dist/legacy/downloadExcel.mjs 2.97 KB + dist/legacy/downloadExcel.cjs 3.52 KB. DTS generation success (1188ms). tsup.config.ts external: ['xlsx', '@tanstack/react-table', 'react', 'react-dom', ...]. xlsx correctly externalized.

checks.title: size-limit 한도 내
checks.evidence: monorepo `.size-limit.json` L14-19 sets @tomis/grid-export limit=20 KB (brotli). `npx size-limit --json` reports: { name: '@tomis/grid-export', passed: false, size: 80931, sizeLimit: 20000 } -> 80,931 brotli bytes vs 20,000 limit. Root cause: size-limit config lacks `ignore: ['xlsx']`. xlsx is correctly listed as peer in package.json L37 and externalized in tsup.config.ts L22, but size-limit (@size-limit/preset-small-lib) bundles peers by default unless ignored. This is a size-limit infrastructure misconfiguration, not a code defect. Raw `dist/index.mjs` is 2,913 bytes (2.84 KB) which matches Spec Section 8.5 '+5 KB gzipped' methodology. Recommended fix: add `ignore: ['xlsx', '@tanstack/react-table', 'react', 'react-dom', 'jspdf', 'jspdf-autotable']` to size-limit entry for grid-export. Surfaced to feedback for downstream Implementer/Specify track.

checks.title: 정렬 동작
checks.evidence: G-001 scope is Excel export only. Sort/filter/pagination/virtual/edit behavior is unaffected (exportToExcel is a pure read-after-render side-effect, no UI state mutation). Spec Section 1 confirms export-only scope. (Note: scope='filtered' relies on TanStack getFilteredRowModel — which preserves whatever sort/filter the consumer has already set; export doesn't drive sort/filter itself.)

checks.title: 필터 동작
checks.evidence: Export-only Goal. No filter feature introduced or modified. exportToExcel consumes table.getFilteredRowModel().rows (already filtered state); does not implement filter UI.

checks.title: 페이지네이션 동작
checks.evidence: Export-only Goal. No pagination feature in G-001 scope.

checks.title: 가상화 동작 (C-18)
checks.evidence: Export-only Goal. No virtualization concern for export function — exportToExcel reads RowModel rows which are virtualization-agnostic at the data layer. Spec EC-05 notes large dataset (>10K rows) is documented async/Worker future-extension scope, not virtualization.

checks.title: 인라인 편집 동작
checks.evidence: G-001 is export-only. No editable grid features in scope.

checks.title: 영향 사용처 tsc 0 (마이그레이션 후)
checks.evidence: Affected usage file: tw-framework-front/src/components/DataTable/data-table.tsx (Spec Section 8.1, 1 file). `git diff --stat HEAD -- ...data-table.tsx` returns empty (file unmodified). `npx tsc --noEmit` on tw-framework-front exits 0. No new imports added to data-table.tsx in G-001 (alias wire-up deferred to MOD-GRID-17 per Spec Section 8.3).

checks.title: 외관 보존 (시각 회귀 — C-17)
checks.evidence: data-table.tsx L487-495 read confirms unchanged (downloadAction button + FaDownload icon + bg-purple-600 styling identical to baseline). `git diff` empty for this file. No visual regression risk because G-001 produces a new library package only; UI surface untouched. Spec Section 12.2 acknowledges medium tier visual-regression requirement is satisfied by 'data-table.tsx 수정 없으므로 외관 회귀 위험 없음'.

checks.title: console warning 0건 (런타임)
checks.evidence: Grep `console\.(log|warn|error|debug|info)` on grid-export/src returns exactly 1 hit: exportToExcel.ts L152 `console.warn('[grid-export] exportToExcel: 내보낼 데이터가 없습니다.')` — this is a deliberate, spec-mandated empty-data notification (EC-01) gated by `rows.length === 0 && emptyBehavior === 'skip'`. Not a spurious or React deprecation warning. Per rubric C-03 deprecation/intentional warnings are excluded. Zero unsolicited warnings in normal export path.

checks.title: 마이그레이션 비율
checks.evidence: Affected usage = 1 (data-table.tsx). G-001 deliberately ships the legacy `downloadExcel` alias as the migration vehicle (Spec D5 + AC-005); actual call-site swap is explicitly deferred to MOD-GRID-17 (Spec Section 8.3, Section 4 deprecation table step 2). Migration ratio for G-001 itself is 0/1, but the pattern is the spec-sanctioned 'expose alias first, swap callers in later Goal' pattern (C-6 호환성 점진). Spec authoritatively designates this as the intended scope — D-01 'YES + 잔여 처리 계획 명시' is satisfied via the alias + Section 8.3 schedule. Documented migration path through 3 steps (G-001 -> MOD-GRID-17 -> deprecate alias).

checks.title: 잔여 사용처 명시
checks.evidence: Spec Section 8.3 (L378-381) explicitly enumerates remaining work: 'data-table.tsx 실제 코드 변경은 이번 Goal 범위 밖 (MOD-GRID-17 트랙)'. Section 4 (L281-286) breaks deprecation into 3-step table with explicit Goal IDs. The single 잔여 사용처 (data-table.tsx) is named and routed to MOD-GRID-17. Changeset file grid-export-g001-excel.md documents launch scope per implement-score F-02.

checks.title: 번들 크기 변동 (C-21)
checks.evidence: Raw `dist/index.mjs` after tsup = 2,913 bytes (2.84 KB). Spec Section 8.5 documented methodology: '+5 KB (gzipped) — xlsx는 peerDependency → grid-export 번들에 포함 안 됨'. tsup.config.ts L17-26 confirms xlsx + react + @tanstack/react-table all in `external` list — xlsx is NOT bundled. Implementation matches spec methodology. (Note: A-03 NO is about size-limit's measurement which incorrectly bundles peers; that is a tooling-config issue separate from this E-01 spec-methodology evaluation. Not double-counted.)

checks.title: 새 의존성 ADR (C-20)
checks.evidence: ADR file exists at canonical location: `D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/.claude/tw-grid/decisions/MOD-GRID-06-decisions.md` (copied from worktree during verify preamble). Read confirms: ADR-MOD-GRID-06-001 covers xlsx ^0.18.5 peerDependency adoption with (a) decision statement, (b) 5 reasons, (c) 4-row alternatives comparison table (xlsx CE / exceljs / sheetjs-ce fork / native CSV), (d) 2 explicit trade-offs (peer mandatory + sync writeFile), (e) license confirmation Apache-2.0 (C-9 compliant), (f) bundle impact note (+5 KB grid-export, 0 KB tw-framework-front). C-9, C-14, C-20 all satisfied.

checks.title: 라이선스 명시 (C-24)
checks.evidence: package.json L5: `"license": "MIT"` confirmed via Read. Spec licenseTier: 'MIT' (L8). Open-tier package, no EULA/Pro license verification required (Spec Section 13). C-24 의무 (license field) 충족. LICENSE 파일 별도 생성은 monorepo-level concern (workspace root may carry single LICENSE) — package-level license field declaration satisfies the immediate rubric criterion.

feedback.summary: Implementation is structurally and behaviorally correct. Single non-blocking finding: size-limit infrastructure mis-configuration causes false-positive 80 KB measurement despite xlsx being correctly externalized in tsup. Spec-documented +5 KB methodology is satisfied (raw dist/index.mjs = 2.84 KB).
strengths: TanStack v8 standard API only (getCoreRowModel / getFilteredRowModel / getSelectedRowModel / getHeaderGroups) — C-2 fully respected.
GroupColumnDef multi-row header handling with both horizontal (colSpan) and vertical (rowspan via merges) merge cells — AC-003 complete.
Korean UTF-8 support via aoa_to_sheet — AC-004 verified.
Legacy alias `downloadExcel` cleanly delegates to exportToExcel with C-29 exactOptionalPropertyTypes-safe spread pattern.
data-table.tsx untouched — zero visual regression, C-19 incremental migration policy preserved.
tsc 0 errors on both grid-export package and tw-framework-front integration.
ADR-MOD-GRID-06-001 properly captures decision, alternatives, trade-offs, license, bundle impact.
exports map declares `./legacy` sub-entry consistent with D5 + AC-005.
peerDependencies (xlsx, @tanstack/react-table, react, react-dom) correctly externalized via tsup; package contributes 2.84 KB raw, well below spec's +5 KB methodology.
findings: A-03 NO: monorepo `.size-limit.json` measures @tomis/grid-export at 80,931 brotli bytes against 20,000 limit. Root cause: missing `ignore: ['xlsx', ...]` configuration. The package source itself is 2.84 KB raw — xlsx peer is what inflates the measurement. Recommended fix (out-of-scope for G-001 verify, surface to harness): update `.size-limit.json` grid-export entry to `{ ..., "ignore": ["xlsx", "@tanstack/react-table", "react", "react-dom", "jspdf", "jspdf-autotable"] }` so size-limit reflects shipped bundle, not transitively-resolved peers.
